overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a steady walk along a city sidewalk. The camera moves past concrete walls with large digital billboards, palm trees, and industrial overhead pipe structures while vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent multi-lane road.

events.description: green sports car passes by on the right side of the road
silver sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward along the sidewalk next to a tall concrete wall with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past the camera on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'ARASAKA' logo and soldier imagery on the concrete wall
tall gray concrete wall with vertical paneling running along the left side of the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street near the industrial structures
large orange and gray industrial pipe structures and gantries visible in the distance on the right
asphalt road with multiple lanes and white markings running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a futuristic city sidewalk bordered by a tall concrete wall with large digital billboards including an Arasaka advertisement. Palm trees and industrial structures line the right side while vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent multi-lane road under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street corner with overhead pipe structures

events.description: camera turns slightly to the right, revealing more of the industrial structures and the street intersection ahead
passing under the large industrial gantry structures as they transition from distant to overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward with a slight rightward drift, approaching the industrial gantry structures

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving away from the camera on the road

entered.detail: large digital billboard with purple and white graphics replacing the previous Arasaka advertisement
tan colored building with the number '12' visible on the upper right side
industrial smoke stacks emitting white smoke visible in the distant cityscape

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward while turning slightly right, bringing the large industrial gantry structures closer until they pass overhead. The Arasaka billboard exits view, replaced by other digital advertisements on the concrete wall. Industrial smoke stacks become visible in the distant cityscape as the environment transitions to a more industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with overhead pipe network

events.description: dark SUV drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the industrial gantries toward the smoke stacks in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through an industrial corridor with large pipe gantries overhead. The concrete wall continues on the left while the smoke stacks ahead grow larger in the frame. The palm trees recede into the distance on the right as the path continues straight toward the industrial center of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a futuristic city sidewalk that gradually transitions from a commercial strip into a heavy industrial zone. It begins beside a tall concrete wall featuring large digital billboards and palm trees, with vehicles passing on an adjacent multi-lane road under a clear midday sun. As the camera moves forward and turns slightly right, the Arasaka advertisement exits the frame and is replaced by other digital displays while massive industrial gantry structures begin to pass overhead. The scene then shifts toward a more industrial landscape as smoke stacks emerge in the distant cityscape and the palm trees recede into the background. Finally, the camera pushes straight through an industrial corridor dominated by overhead pipe gantries, moving closer toward the towering smoke stacks at the city's industrial center.
